The '''Audessian Expanse''' was a region on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]. On the opposite side of the [[Xulropic Badlands]] from the [[Western Dune Sea/Legends|Western Dune Sea]], they were on the border of the [[Planet/Legends|planet's]] habitable zone.
